case_scores.notes: Medium staged shape, D0-D6 selection log, roles separation, contract assertions, linter pass, Codex runbook, and banned-token cleanliness all verified. Score is reduced for the known nonblocking design-quality residual: the test-drift gate catches tracked test edits but not new untracked test files.

Large fan-out shape, independent shard dependency graph, D4 large justification, concurrent codex exec/worktree/ledger runbook language, evaluator separation, linter pass, and banned-token cleanliness all verified.

Battery passed 71/71, sibling linter cmp returned 0, frontmatter description length is 295 chars, codex-runtime.md is present and maps runtime concerns, and all three goldens rendered in a temp directory with no banned tokens in generated runbooks.

extra_probe_scores.notes: Mutating roles.evaluator.separate_context to false made the linter fail with roles.evaluator.separate_context.
Adding a dependency cycle made the linter fail with stages.reachability.
